extraction.one_line_summary: THOMAS Geraint attacked within 5km to go on the final climb to Poman, gaining 24+ seconds on GC rivals when no organized chase emerged.
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step/Soudal set pace on steepest climb section then immediately attacked, forcing Sky to respond rather than control
THOMAS attacked same location as Steels previous year, suggesting finish-specific tactical knowledge of Poman approach
DUMOULIN soloed across gaps when group neutralized behind Thomas, gaining time on GC rivals unwilling to chase
Lead group stalemate: CASTRAVIEJO and JUNGELS refused mutual chase responsibility, allowing 24-second gap to become unbridgeable

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Responded to Quick-Step attacks then immediately counterattacked within 5km, showing superior form recovery after TTT disappointment
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Bridged gaps solo to take second, demonstrating diesel power while others sat behind marked
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: Present in lead group but third place suggests inability to follow accelerations or contest sprint
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: negative: Refused to chase THOMAS despite being in lead group, suggesting either tactical confusion or lack of form
rider_signals.CASTRAVIEJO Jonathan: negative: Declined to organize chase when in lead group, potentially protecting teammate but allowing GC damage
rider_signals.YATES Caleb: negative: Abandoned race early in stage, eliminating sprint threat
